description:
The Modrinth App is a unique, open source Minecraft launcher that allows you to play your favorite mods, and keep them up to date, all in one neat little package.


Changed
- Improved the Browse page header so the back button no longer shifts the layout.
- Modrinth Hosting: Updated Modrinth Hosting content browsing so multiple projects can be selected before installation.
- Modrinth Hosting: After installing selected content, the Modrinth Hosting content page now reopens immediately and shows pending projects as installing.
- Modrinth Hosting: Project icons now appear in the action bar when selecting multiple projects in the Content tab.

Fixed
- Fixed instance redirects opening a broken page state.
- Modrinth Hosting: Fixed selected content and dependencies not staying marked as installing.
- Modrinth Hosting: Fixed page shifts while dependencies resolve during installation.
